agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: ZIP codes with higher housing costs reflect higher operational cost structures, so nonprofits operating in these regions spend more on fundraising (fees + events).
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Harrison & Wolch (1998) discuss spatial constraints and cost factors.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant positive correlation was found. Fundraising expenses are slightly higher in high-cost ZIP codes, indicating that local real estate prices scale up event production overhead.
